title: hieracium anguinum
intro: Hieracium anguinum, also known as serpent's tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium anguinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Hieracium anguinum can be made into teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
